architecture.summary: Bug fix in existing publish pipeline: processSubmission -> publishSkill flow. No new components. Fix vendor flag propagation in 3 existing files.

integrations.summary: N/A - No new integrations. Fix is internal to existing KV + DB dual-write pattern in submission-store.ts and process-submission.ts.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - Backend-only fix. CLI display logic (vskill find) already correctly shows cert tier from DB. No UI changes needed.

performance.summary: N/A - No performance impact. markVendor adds one KV put + one DB update, same as existing patterns.

security.summary: Trust pipeline fix: vendor orgs get CERTIFIED/T4 trust instead of community VERIFIED. Vendor org list is hardcoded in provider-registry.ts. No new auth or access control changes.

edge-cases.summary: Edge case: publishSkill fallback check via isVendorOrg(owner) when sub.isVendor is false (race condition or legacy data). Backfill needed for existing vendor skills published before fix.
